# Test source

```ts
  1  | import { test, expect } from '@playwright/test';
  2  | 
  3  | let url: string = 'https://www.lotuss.com/th';
  4  | let product: string = 'น้ำสิงห์';
  5  | 
  6  | test('test', async ({ page }) => {
  7  |   const context = await page.context();
  8  |   await context.grantPermissions(['geolocation']);
  9  |   await context.setGeolocation({ latitude: 13.7563, longitude: 100.5018 }); // Bangkok
  10 | 
  11 |   await page.goto(url);
> 12 |   await page.getByRole('button', { name: 'ยอมรับคุกกี้ทั้งหมด' }).click();
     |                                                                   ^ Error: locator.click: Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
  13 |   await page.getByRole('combobox', { name: 'ค้นหาใน Lotus\'s' }).click();
  14 | 
  15 |   await page.getByRole('combobox', { name: 'ค้นหาใน Lotus\'s' }).fill(product);
  16 |   await page.getByRole('combobox', { name: 'ค้นหาใน Lotus\'s' }).press('Enter');
```
